babyDevelopment: The ears are fully formed and in their final position. Your baby can now hear your heartbeat, stomach grumbling, and your voice! Myelin is forming around nerves.
bodyChanges: You're likely feeling much more distinct kicks now. You may experience lower backaches as your uterus expands further and your joints loosen.
tips: and sing to your baby—they can hear you!

do: Use a heating pad on lowest setting for backaches
more frequent meals to prevent heartburn
dont: Do exercises requiring balancing on one foot

travelAdvisory.note: Plan any long trips before the third trimester begins.

warningSignsToWatch: Dull backache that comes and goes rhythmically
milestoneDescription: Your baby is listening! It's a great time to start talking and singing to the bump.
